description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile wooden storage unit with a flat top surface and two prominent metal handles on the front face. The main body is constructed from medium-dark stained wood, featuring a visible grain pattern that adds a natural texture. The top edge is bordered by a lighter, possibly metallic or painted trim, providing a subtle contrast to the wood. The front side is equipped with two curved, dark metal handles, suggesting the presence of a pull-out drawer or compartment. The back panel appears to be a solid, lighter-colored surface, likely for mounting or stability. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use as a wall-mounted shelf or shallow cabinet in urban environments such as hallways, entryways, or garages.
description: A rectangular wooden storage unit with a flat top, dark metal handles, and a contrasting light trim. Its simple, sturdy design makes it suitable for wall-mounted use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two curved metal handles and the contrasting light trim along the top edge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the wooden body and the protruding handles, with the wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, light-colored back panel and the full width of the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and the edge of the handles.
